LightningComponentBundle.description: Quote lines with bundle hierarchy, column list from App Builder only, optional add-products search (price book), mobile + desktop.

property.name: displayColumns
property.label: Display columns
property.description: Solo editable aquí (Lightning App Builder). API names separados por coma o salto de línea; deben estar en el Field Set (ProductName = nombre del producto). Vacío = mismo orden por defecto del componente.

property.name: fieldSetName
property.label: Field Set API Name
property.description: QuoteLineItem field set: lista blanca de columnas permitidas.

property.name: hideRuntimeColumnPicker
property.label: Hide runtime column picker (deprecated)
property.description: El selector de columnas en tiempo de ejecución ya no existe; las columnas solo se configuran con Display columns. Se mantiene por compatibilidad con páginas existentes.

property.name: hideAddProducts
property.label: Hide add products
property.description: If true, hides the product search / add line section.

property.name: configuratorFlowApiName
property.label: Configurator Flow API Name (fallback)
property.description: Fallback Flow API name when ProductConfigurationFlow is not assigned to a product. The primary flow is resolved per-product from ProductConfigFlowAssignment.

property.name: configuratorFlowInputVariableName
property.label: Configurator Flow input variable name
property.description: Flow input variable that receives the QuoteLineItem Id.

property.name: showConfigureAction
property.label: Show Configure
property.description: Master toggle. When true, 'Configurar' appears on rows whose product has an active ProductConfigurationFlow.
